text.title: Solo Time Tracking Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply time-tracking discipline end-to-end.

step.name: single-source-capture
step.input: Tracking tool + active projects + labels taxonomy
step.action: Start/stop timer at session boundary. Tag block with project + task from closed lists. Retro-tracking BANNED.

step.name: friday-reconciliation
step.action: Pull weekly data, detect gaps >30min, list untagged blocks for operator labelling.
step.decision-gate: If multi-tool sources detected → halt, designate single source, mark others signal_only.

step.name: classify-write-offs
step.action: Pick reason from closed list (SALES / ADMIN / LEARNING / UNBILLABLE-REWORK / BREAK). "Other" forbidden. ADMIN share > 60% surfaces trend warning.

step.name: compute-metrics
step.action: billable_pct_actual = billable / total_tracked. Top 5 tasks by hours.

step.name: invoice-draft
step.action: Aggregate by project at rate. Round line-level to 0.25h, never round week-level down. Emit invoice_drafts.
